name: Melbourne

Derby,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Melbourne, Aston-on-Trent, Weston-on-Trent and surroundings.

This is a predominantly rural area stretching from Staunton Harold Reservoir to Elvaston and Shardlow bordering Leicestershire. The area incorporates Calke Abbey, Melbourne Hall and Elvaston Castle, these locations attracting large numbers of walkers and visitors alike.
